data.title: Should Lockheed Stock Be in Your Portfolio Ahead of Q3 Earnings Report?
data.description: Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE: LMT) is slated to release third-quarter 2024 results on Oct. 22, before the opening bell.

Blackstone's BREIT Struggles Ahead Of Earnings As Performance Fees Fall Short
data.description: Traders are investors are watching for Blackstone's Q3 earnings report. Before the report, BREIT posted modest September gains but missed the Q3 fee threshold, raising concerns from analysts.

data.title: ASML Holding Stock Continues To Slide, Other Chipmakers Bounce Back: 'We Are Still Quite Optimistic About AI'
data.description: ASML Holding N.V. (NASDAQ:ASML) shares continue to move lower on Wednesday, adding to steep losses from Tuesday after the chip equipment maker cut its full-year outlook.
